official_competition_evidence.filename: 2026年中国研究生人工智能大赛--华为赛题 (1).docx

missing_official_semantics: K value or whether the score is truncated at K
precision denominator when fewer than K papers are returned
per-query macro versus global micro aggregation
public and hidden split aggregation details

contest_requirements_summary.finding: repeats weights but supplies no scorer, exact formula, K, identity, or aggregation contract

historical_scoring_rules.finding: labels its Top-K fields and formulas as standard or recommended project metrics, not an official contest scorer

current_internal_metrics.finding: uses fixed-K precision denominators, unified identity matching, per-query F1@K, and macro averaging; these semantics are not specified by the official contest document

reference_repository_candidates_rejected.name: AstaBench PaperFindingBench
reference_repository_candidates_rejected.reason: the contest document lists AstaBench only as a reference dataset/system and never designates its query-type-specific standard/adjusted F1 scorer as the contest scorer

reference_repository_candidates_rejected.name: PaSa AutoScholarQuery metrics
reference_repository_candidates_rejected.reason: the contest document lists PaSa only as a reference dataset/system; its script normalizes titles and reports averaged precision and recall rather than a contest F1 score

decision.reason: selecting or reconstructing a scorer would require guessing among materially different non-contest reference implementations

unblock_requirement: obtain a versioned official contest scorer or an official specification defining the complete input schema, F1/K, identity, duplicate, unknown-document, unevaluable-gold, and aggregation semantics
